hooks.command: echo 'UNAGI AFK MODE. On each task: 1) Read PRD.md, find next - [ ] item. 2) RED: write failing test first. 3) GREEN: implement minimum code to pass. 4) Refactor. 5) Commit. 6) Update progress.md. 7) Mark - [x] in PRD.md. Rules: never mark done if tests fail; one task per invocation; if blocked write BLOCKED to progress.md.'
